hero.description: Organize every game you own — Steam, Epic, GOG, emulators — in one fast, private, offline-first desktop app built with Rust and Tauri.

privacy.label: Privacy
privacy.heading: Offline first.
privacy.text: Your library lives on your machine. No accounts, no telemetry, no cloud dependency.

performance.label: Performance
performance.heading:
Built on Rust
and Tauri.
performance.text: Opens in under a second. Minimal memory footprint. More RAM for your games.

openSource.label: Open Source
openSource.heading:
MIT licensed,
fully auditable.
openSource.text: Read the source, contribute features, or fork it. The code is yours to inspect.

wishlist.heading:
Find your next game
by what you love.
wishlist.description: Search for games by characteristics — genre, mood, mechanics — using the GameBrain API. Add exactly what you want to your list, not what a storefront recommends.
bullets: Search by genre, theme, and playstyle
Browse rich metadata before you add

gameDetails.heading:
Everything about
a game, in one place.
gameDetails.description: The game details window opens into four tabs: description, media, similar games and technical specs. So you know exactly what you're installing before you hit download.
bullets: Screenshots and trailers in the Media tab
System requirements and language support from PCGamingWiki
Similar games recommended from your own library context

playlist.heading:
Queue up your
next adventure.
playlist.description: Build an ordered playlist of games you want to play next. Drag to reorder, launch directly from the queue, and never lose track of what you were going to play.
bullets: Launch games directly from the playlist
Keep your backlog organized and intentional

freeGames.heading:
Never miss a
free game again.
freeGames.description: Playlite tracks limited-time giveaways from Epic Games, Steam, and other storefronts in one place. Claim what you want before it's gone.
bullets: Giveaways from Epic, Steam, and more
See expiration dates at a glance

subscriptions.heading:
All your subscriptions,
one place.
subscriptions.description: Browse games available through Prime Gaming, Game Pass, EA Play, Ubisoft+ and Humble Choice without switching between apps.
bullets: Prime Gaming, Game Pass, EA Play, Ubisoft+, Humble Choice
Expiration countdowns so you never miss a claim

unified.title: Unified library
unified.text: See every launcher, emulator, and collection in one place.

wishlist.title: Smart wishlist
wishlist.text: Track the games you want without losing context on why you wanted them.

details.title: Fast details
details.text: Jump into description, media and specs from a single screen.

support.label: Support the Project
support.heading: Playlite is and always will be free.
support.description: Playlite will remain free and open source. Donations are entirely optional and help fund the development and maintenance of the project.

cta.heading: Ready to unify your collection?
cta.description: Download Playlite today and take control of your game library. 100% open-source.
